scored_niches.notes: 36M science community (r/science alone has 32.7M). Zero dedicated daily science curiosity/learning streak apps. Khan Academy covers it broadly. Massive underserved opportunity for a science habit tracker with daily experiments/facts/challenges.

8.49M relationship community. Couple, Between, Love Nudge, Gottman all have partial habit features. Gap exists: none build a full daily streak gamification system with XP/levels for both partners simultaneously.

7.85M parenting community. All apps track milestones or share photos. Zero apps gamify the daily HABIT of conscious parenting practices (reading together, limit screens, one-on-one time) with streak/XP.
5.6M toddler/early childhood community. All apps are child-facing learning platforms. No app tracks and gamifies the PARENT's daily habit of doing learning activities with their toddler.

3.9M fiction writing community. Dabble, NaNoWriMo, Squibler all have partial streak/word-count mechanics. Gap: none have pure streak gamification with XP/levels/badges for daily fiction writing practice.
3.5M communication/self-improvement community. No dedicated daily communication skills streak app. Orai covers public speaking only. Huge gap for daily conversational skill habit gamification.
3.2M poetry community. Apps are reference tools or reading apps. No app gamifies the daily WRITING of poetry with streak/XP/leveling for aspiring poets.
2.2M math community. Khan Academy has basic streaks but is broad education. No adult-focused, math-specific daily practice streak app with full gamification (XP, levels, problem-type tracking).

2.1M dedicated parenting/toddler reading community (excluding broad r/books overlap). All apps deliver content to kids. No app gamifies the daily FAMILY reading-aloud habit with streak tracking and XP.
1.76M worldbuilding community. All apps are organizational/wiki tools for complex projects. No app gamifies the daily worldbuilding habit with streak tracking and progression mechanics.
1.4M conflict resolution/communication community. Therapy apps handle clinical intervention. Zero apps gamify the daily practice of conflict resolution skills with streak/XP mechanics.
1.3M screenwriting community. All apps are professional formatting/production tools. Zero apps gamify the daily screenwriting practice habit with streak/XP for aspiring writers.
